description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a mix of white and gray exterior walls. The property features a front yard with a driveway, a rear garden area, and several mature trees providing shade and landscaping. The house has multiple windows arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some large windows facing the front and side yards. A small porch with steps leads to the main entryway, which is partially obscured by foliage. The backyard includes a patio area and a small pool, separated from the street by a low wall and additional greenery. The overall design is modern suburban, with clean lines and practical outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story suburban house with a gable roof, asymmetrical windows, landscaped yards, and a small backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entryway, front yard, driveway, and several trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard, pool, and rear garden area with trees and a low wall.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the driveway, garage, and a clear view of the backyard lawn and trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio, and additional landscaping in the backyard.
attribute_entryway_design: Small porch with steps, partially obscured by foliage, featuring a single main door and minimal decorative elements.
